text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm observing a concert for ideas, when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... I really hope I can pull this off...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry, Flower! You're going to
do great!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You got first place today, after all! You even
managed to beat me, the class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So you should have confidence in yourself! You
won against me! ME!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, thanks. I'm just worried my performance
won't be able to get across to my fans how much I
appreciate them...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower, listen. All you need to do is... BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Together, now! You know the magic word!
Leeet's...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIIIIN!
RIP!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, what was that tearing sound just now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? What? Who?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, Bakushin O! Your skirt's tearing a bit in
the back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: WHAT?! Where? WHERE?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, please stop moving! You're going to make it
worse!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, could it be the fabric couldn't handle my
explosive Bakushin energy?!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower, Sakura Bakushin O. You're on in
five!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yikes! What to do? What to do?! I can not go out there in anything but perfect condition!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll fix it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
With my speed, I can go grab my sewing tools
and be back just in time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And then, if I just sew really quickly, we might be
able to make it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What?! We can?! There's still hope?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Please, calm down. Remember? What's important
right now is...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Confidence!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Done! Your skirt is as good as new!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... And just in time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What steady stitching! Oh, thank you, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Accurate, excellent, and above all, speedy! That
kind of reliability could make you a perfect class
rep!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I should be thanking you. Fixing your skirt
has really calmed me down.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What you said about confidence really helped me
remember how important it is.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm sure I'll be able to express my gratitude
to my fans!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But since this was a rush job, the stitching might
be a bit fragile...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So make sure not to do move around too much or
too wildly—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My thanks to you, Flower! The class
representative is BACK, BABY!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: To the stage we go! LET'S BAKUSHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I haven't taken the sewing pins out yet!
